untranslatable_reason: The signal describes a technical pattern (Right-angled Ascending Broadening Formation) that requires detection of specific geometric structures: (1) horizontal trend line connecting minor lows, (2) up-sloping trend line connecting minor highs, and (3) price broadening outward. These require multi-bar pattern recognition, swing point identification, and trend line slope calculations that cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.) and simple comparison operators. Pattern detection of this complexity requires either: a pre-calculated pattern indicator input, or algorithmic swing detection and geometric analysis unavailable in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This is a chart pattern recognition signal requiring visual/geometric analysis. A simplified proxy using pivot points and price action has been provided as entry_short, but this does NOT capture the true pattern definition. For accurate backtesting, either: (1) implement a custom swing-detection indicator to identify the formation, or (2) use the pattern_name parameter with a dedicated pattern-matching library outside this rule engine.
